message:
test(cold-start): add comprehensive unit tests for cold_start_compilation_lane

Add a 277-line test module covering constants validation, serde
roundtrips for all artifact types (ArtifactContext, TraceIdsArtifact,
EntryKindSummary, ColdStartObservabilityDeltaRow), and schema version
assertions. These tests verify that the cold-start compilation lane's
data structures serialize and deserialize correctly and that sentinel
constants (bead IDs, file names, schema versions) are well-formed.

Also includes updated beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
